full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23364

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23364.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
